Resource Profile: PH Core Procedure

Official URL: https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-procedure Version: 0.2.0
Draft as of 2026-06-17 Computable Name: PHCoreProcedure

An action that is or was performed on or for a patient, practitioner, device, organization, or location.

Usages:

  • Refer to this Profile: PH Core Encounter, PH Core Medication Administration, PH Core Medication Statement, PH Core Observation and PH Core Procedure
  • Examples for this Profile: Procedure/procedure-single-example

You can also check for usages in the FHIR IG Statistics

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description Differentials, Snapshots, and other representations.

  • Key Elements Table
  • Differential Table
  • Snapshot Table
  • Obligations
  • Statistics/References
  • All
NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints    Filter:
Bindings
Constraints
Obligations
Procedure 0..* Procedure An action that is being or was performed on a patient
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
partOf Σ 0..* Reference(PH Core Procedure | Observation | MedicationAdministration) Part of referenced event
status ?!SOΣ 1..1 code preparation | in-progress | not-done | on-hold | stopped | completed | entered-in-error | unknown
Binding: EventStatus (required): A code specifying the state of the procedure.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:handle PH Core Server
SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
SHALL:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
statusReason SOΣ 0..1 CodeableConcept Reason for current status
Binding: ProcedureNotPerformedReason(SNOMED-CT) (example): A code that identifies the reason a procedure was not performed.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:handle PH Core Server
SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
coding SOΣ 0..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system

SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
text SOΣ 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept

SHALL:handle PH Core Server
SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
category SOΣ 0..1 CodeableConcept Classification of the procedure
Binding: ProcedureCategoryCodes(SNOMEDCT) (example): A code that classifies a procedure for searching, sorting and display purposes.

code SOΣ 0..1 CodeableConcept Identification of the procedure

encounter SOΣ 0..1 Reference(PH Core Encounter) Encounter created as part of

SHALL:handle PH Core Server

MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
performed[x] SOΣ 0..1 When the procedure was performed
ObligationsActor
SHALL:handle PH Core Server
SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
performedDateTime dateTime
performedPeriod Period
performedString string
performedAge Age
performedRange Range
recorder Σ 0..1 Reference(PH Core Patient | PH Core RelatedPerson | PH Core Practitioner | PH Core PractitionerRole) Who recorded the procedure
asserter Σ 0..1 Reference(PH Core Patient | PH Core RelatedPerson | PH Core Practitioner | PH Core PractitionerRole) Person who asserts this procedure
performer Σ 0..* BackboneElement The people who performed the procedure
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
function SOΣ 0..1 CodeableConcept Type of performance
Binding: ProcedurePerformerRoleCodes (example): A code that identifies the role of a performer of the procedure.

SHALL:handle PH Core Server
SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator

text SOΣ 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept

MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
actor Σ 1..1 Reference(PH Core Practitioner | PH Core PractitionerRole | PH Core Organization | PH Core Patient | PH Core RelatedPerson | Device) The reference to the practitioner
onBehalfOf 0..1 Reference(PH Core Organization) Organization the device or practitioner was acting for
location Σ 0..1 Reference(PH Core Location) Where the procedure happened
reasonCode SOΣ 0..* CodeableConcept Coded reason procedure performed
Binding: ProcedureReasonCodes (example): A code that identifies the reason a procedure is required.

outcome SOΣ 0..1 CodeableConcept The result of procedure
Binding: ProcedureOutcomeCodes(SNOMEDCT) (example): An outcome of a procedure - whether it was resolved or otherwise.

complication SO 0..* CodeableConcept Complication following the procedure
Binding: Condition/Problem/DiagnosisCodes (example): Codes describing complications that resulted from a procedure.

focalDevice 0..* BackboneElement Manipulated, implanted, or removed device
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
action SO 0..1 CodeableConcept Kind of change to device
Binding: ProcedureDeviceActionCodes (preferred): A kind of change that happened to the device during the procedure.

usedReference 0..* Reference(Device | PH Core Medication | Substance) Items used during procedure

Documentation for this format

Terminology Bindings

Path Status Usage ValueSet Version Source
Procedure.status Base required EventStatus 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.statusReason Base example Procedure Not Performed Reason (SNOMED-CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.category Base example Procedure Category Codes (SNOMED CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.code Base example Procedure Codes (SNOMED CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.performer.​function Base example Procedure Performer Role Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.reasonCode Base example Procedure Reason Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.bodySite Base example SNOMED CT Body Structures 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.outcome Base example Procedure Outcome Codes (SNOMED CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.complication Base example Condition/Problem/Diagnosis Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.followUp Base example Procedure Follow up Codes (SNOMED CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.focalDevice.​action Base preferred Procedure Device Action Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.usedCode Base example FHIR Device Types 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.

Constraints

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
dom-2 error Procedure If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Procedure If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Procedure If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Procedure If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice Procedure A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

Documentation for this format
NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints    Filter:
Bindings
Constraints
Obligations
Procedure 0..* Procedure An action that is being or was performed on a patient
id Σ 0..1 id Logical id of this artifact
meta Σ 0..1 Meta Metadata about the resource
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
language 0..1 code Language of the resource content
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.
Additional BindingsPurpose
AllLanguages Max Binding
text 0..1 Narrative Text summary of the resource, for human interpretation
This profile does not constrain the narrative in regard to content, language, or traceability to data elements
contained 0..* Resource Contained, inline Resources
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
identifier Σ 0..* Identifier External Identifiers for this procedure
instantiatesCanonical Σ 0..* canonical(PlanDefinition | ActivityDefinition | Measure | OperationDefinition | Questionnaire) Instantiates FHIR protocol or definition
instantiatesUri Σ 0..* uri Instantiates external protocol or definition
basedOn Σ 0..* Reference(CarePlan | ServiceRequest) A request for this procedure
partOf Σ 0..* Reference(PH Core Procedure | Observation | MedicationAdministration) Part of referenced event
status ?!SOΣ 1..1 code preparation | in-progress | not-done | on-hold | stopped | completed | entered-in-error | unknown
Binding: EventStatus (required): A code specifying the state of the procedure.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:handle PH Core Server
SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
SHALL:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
statusReason SOΣ 0..1 CodeableConcept Reason for current status
Binding: ProcedureNotPerformedReason(SNOMED-CT) (example): A code that identifies the reason a procedure was not performed.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:handle PH Core Server
SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
coding SOΣ 0..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system

SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
text SOΣ 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept

SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
category SOΣ 0..1 CodeableConcept Classification of the procedure

MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
subject SOΣ 1..1 Reference(PH Core Patient | Group) Who the procedure was performed on
ObligationsActor
SHALL:handle PH Core Server
SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
SHALL:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
encounter SOΣ 0..1 Reference(PH Core Encounter) Encounter created as part of
ObligationsActor
SHALL:handle PH Core Server
SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
performed[x] SOΣ 0..1 When the procedure was performed
ObligationsActor
SHALL:handle PH Core Server
SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
performedDateTime dateTime
performedPeriod Period
performedString string
performedAge Age
performedRange Range
recorder Σ 0..1 Reference(PH Core Patient | PH Core RelatedPerson | PH Core Practitioner | PH Core PractitionerRole) Who recorded the procedure
asserter Σ 0..1 Reference(PH Core Patient | PH Core RelatedPerson | PH Core Practitioner | PH Core PractitionerRole) Person who asserts this procedure
performer Σ 0..* BackboneElement The people who performed the procedure
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
function SOΣ 0..1 CodeableConcept Type of performance
Binding: ProcedurePerformerRoleCodes (example): A code that identifies the role of a performer of the procedure.

actor Σ 1..1 Reference(PH Core Practitioner | PH Core PractitionerRole | PH Core Organization | PH Core Patient | PH Core RelatedPerson | Device) The reference to the practitioner
onBehalfOf 0..1 Reference(PH Core Organization) Organization the device or practitioner was acting for
location Σ 0..1 Reference(PH Core Location) Where the procedure happened
reasonCode SOΣ 0..* CodeableConcept Coded reason procedure performed
Binding: ProcedureReasonCodes (example): A code that identifies the reason a procedure is required.

SHALL:handle PH Core Server
SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
bodySite SOΣ 0..* CodeableConcept Target body sites

action SO 0..1 CodeableConcept Kind of change to device
Binding: ProcedureDeviceActionCodes (preferred): A kind of change that happened to the device during the procedure.

Binding: FHIRDeviceTypes (example): Codes describing items used during a procedure.

Documentation for this format

Terminology Bindings

Path Status Usage ValueSet Version Source
Procedure.language Base preferred Common Languages 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.status Base required EventStatus 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.statusReason Base example Procedure Not Performed Reason (SNOMED-CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.category Base example Procedure Category Codes (SNOMED CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.code Base example Procedure Codes (SNOMED CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.performer.​function Base example Procedure Performer Role Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.reasonCode Base example Procedure Reason Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.bodySite Base example SNOMED CT Body Structures 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.outcome Base example Procedure Outcome Codes (SNOMED CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.complication Base example Condition/Problem/Diagnosis Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.followUp Base example Procedure Follow up Codes (SNOMED CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.focalDevice.​action Base preferred Procedure Device Action Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.usedCode Base example FHIR Device Types 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.

Constraints

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
dom-2 error Procedure If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Procedure If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Procedure If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Procedure If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice Procedure A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

Documentation for this format

Summary

Must-Support: 38 elements

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • PH Core Procedure (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-procedure)
  • PH Core Patient (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-patient)
  • PH Core Encounter (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-encounter)
  • PH Core RelatedPerson (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-relatedperson)
  • PH Core Practitioner (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-practitioner)
  • PH Core PractitionerRole (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-practitionerrole)
  • PH Core Organization (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-organization)
  • PH Core Location (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-location)
  • PH Core Observation (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-observation)
  • PH Core Medication (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-medication)

Bindings
Constraints
Obligations
Procedure 0..* Procedure An action that is being or was performed on a patient
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
partOf Σ 0..* Reference(PH Core Procedure | Observation | MedicationAdministration) Part of referenced event
status ?!SOΣ 1..1 code preparation | in-progress | not-done | on-hold | stopped | completed | entered-in-error | unknown
Binding: EventStatus (required): A code specifying the state of the procedure.

code SOΣ 0..1 CodeableConcept Identification of the procedure
Binding: ProcedureCodes(SNOMEDCT) (example): A code to identify a specific procedure .

SHALL:handle PH Core Server

SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer

performed[x] SOΣ 0..1 When the procedure was performed
ObligationsActor
SHALL:handle PH Core Server
SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
performedDateTime dateTime
performedPeriod Period
performedString string
performedAge Age
performedRange Range
recorder Σ 0..1 Reference(PH Core Patient | PH Core RelatedPerson | PH Core Practitioner | PH Core PractitionerRole) Who recorded the procedure
asserter Σ 0..1 Reference(PH Core Patient | PH Core RelatedPerson | PH Core Practitioner | PH Core PractitionerRole) Person who asserts this procedure
performer Σ 0..* BackboneElement The people who performed the procedure
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
function SOΣ 0..1 CodeableConcept Type of performance
Binding: ProcedurePerformerRoleCodes (example): A code that identifies the role of a performer of the procedure.

SHALL:handle PH Core Server

text SOΣ 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept

actor Σ 1..1 Reference(PH Core Practitioner | PH Core PractitionerRole | PH Core Organization | PH Core Patient | PH Core RelatedPerson | Device) The reference to the practitioner
onBehalfOf 0..1 Reference(PH Core Organization) Organization the device or practitioner was acting for
location Σ 0..1 Reference(PH Core Location) Where the procedure happened
reasonCode SOΣ 0..* CodeableConcept Coded reason procedure performed
Binding: ProcedureReasonCodes (example): A code that identifies the reason a procedure is required.

SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
bodySite SOΣ 0..* CodeableConcept Target body sites

complication SO 0..* CodeableConcept Complication following the procedure

followUp SO 0..* CodeableConcept Instructions for follow up

SHALL:handle PH Core Server

action SO 0..1 CodeableConcept Kind of change to device
Binding: ProcedureDeviceActionCodes (preferred): A kind of change that happened to the device during the procedure.

Documentation for this format

Terminology Bindings

Path Status Usage ValueSet Version Source
Procedure.status Base required EventStatus 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.statusReason Base example Procedure Not Performed Reason (SNOMED-CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.category Base example Procedure Category Codes (SNOMED CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.code Base example Procedure Codes (SNOMED CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.performer.​function Base example Procedure Performer Role Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.reasonCode Base example Procedure Reason Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.bodySite Base example SNOMED CT Body Structures 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.outcome Base example Procedure Outcome Codes (SNOMED CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.complication Base example Condition/Problem/Diagnosis Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.followUp Base example Procedure Follow up Codes (SNOMED CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.focalDevice.​action Base preferred Procedure Device Action Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.usedCode Base example FHIR Device Types 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.

Constraints

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
dom-2 error Procedure If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Procedure If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Procedure If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Procedure If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice Procedure A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

Snapshot ViewView

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints    Filter:
Bindings
Constraints
Obligations
Procedure 0..* Procedure An action that is being or was performed on a patient
id Σ 0..1 id Logical id of this artifact
meta Σ 0..1 Meta Metadata about the resource
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
language 0..1 code Language of the resource content
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.
Additional BindingsPurpose
AllLanguages Max Binding
text 0..1 Narrative Text summary of the resource, for human interpretation
This profile does not constrain the narrative in regard to content, language, or traceability to data elements
contained 0..* Resource Contained, inline Resources
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
identifier Σ 0..* Identifier External Identifiers for this procedure
instantiatesCanonical Σ 0..* canonical(PlanDefinition | ActivityDefinition | Measure | OperationDefinition | Questionnaire) Instantiates FHIR protocol or definition
instantiatesUri Σ 0..* uri Instantiates external protocol or definition
basedOn Σ 0..* Reference(CarePlan | ServiceRequest) A request for this procedure
partOf Σ 0..* Reference(PH Core Procedure | Observation | MedicationAdministration) Part of referenced event
status ?!SOΣ 1..1 code preparation | in-progress | not-done | on-hold | stopped | completed | entered-in-error | unknown
Binding: EventStatus (required): A code specifying the state of the procedure.
ObligationsActor
SHALL:handle PH Core Server
SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
SHALL:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
statusReason SOΣ 0..1 CodeableConcept Reason for current status
Binding: ProcedureNotPerformedReason(SNOMED-CT) (example): A code that identifies the reason a procedure was not performed.

MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
subject SOΣ 1..1 Reference(PH Core Patient | Group) Who the procedure was performed on
ObligationsActor
SHALL:handle PH Core Server
SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
SHALL:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
encounter SOΣ 0..1 Reference(PH Core Encounter) Encounter created as part of
ObligationsActor

SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
performed[x] SOΣ 0..1 When the procedure was performed
ObligationsActor
SHALL:handle PH Core Server
SHALL:handle PH Core Consumer
MAY:able-to-populate PH Core Creator
performedDateTime dateTime
performedPeriod Period
performedString string
performedAge Age
performedRange Range
recorder Σ 0..1 Reference(PH Core Patient | PH Core RelatedPerson | PH Core Practitioner | PH Core PractitionerRole) Who recorded the procedure
asserter Σ 0..1 Reference(PH Core Patient | PH Core RelatedPerson | PH Core Practitioner | PH Core PractitionerRole) Person who asserts this procedure
performer Σ 0..* BackboneElement The people who performed the procedure
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
function SOΣ 0..1 CodeableConcept Type of performance
Binding: ProcedurePerformerRoleCodes (example): A code that identifies the role of a performer of the procedure.

actor Σ 1..1 Reference(PH Core Practitioner | PH Core PractitionerRole | PH Core Organization | PH Core Patient | PH Core RelatedPerson | Device) The reference to the practitioner
onBehalfOf 0..1 Reference(PH Core Organization) Organization the device or practitioner was acting for
location Σ 0..1 Reference(PH Core Location) Where the procedure happened
reasonCode SOΣ 0..* CodeableConcept Coded reason procedure performed
Binding: ProcedureReasonCodes (example): A code that identifies the reason a procedure is required.

note 0..* Annotation Additional information about the procedure
focalDevice 0..* BackboneElement Manipulated, implanted, or removed device
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
action SO 0..1 CodeableConcept Kind of change to device
Binding: ProcedureDeviceActionCodes (preferred): A kind of change that happened to the device during the procedure.

SHALL:handle PH Core Server

usedReference 0..* Reference(Device | PH Core Medication | Substance) Items used during procedure
usedCode SO 0..* CodeableConcept Coded items used during the procedure
Binding: FHIRDeviceTypes (example): Codes describing items used during a procedure.

Documentation for this format

Terminology Bindings

Path Status Usage ValueSet Version Source
Procedure.language Base preferred Common Languages 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.status Base required EventStatus 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.statusReason Base example Procedure Not Performed Reason (SNOMED-CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.category Base example Procedure Category Codes (SNOMED CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.code Base example Procedure Codes (SNOMED CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.performer.​function Base example Procedure Performer Role Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.reasonCode Base example Procedure Reason Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.bodySite Base example SNOMED CT Body Structures 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.outcome Base example Procedure Outcome Codes (SNOMED CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.complication Base example Condition/Problem/Diagnosis Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.followUp Base example Procedure Follow up Codes (SNOMED CT) 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.focalDevice.​action Base preferred Procedure Device Action Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.
Procedure.usedCode Base example FHIR Device Types 📍4.0.1 FHIR Std.

Constraints

Id Grade Path(s) Description Expression
dom-2 error Procedure If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Procedure If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Procedure If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Procedure If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice Procedure A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

Documentation for this format

Summary

Must-Support: 38 elements

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • PH Core Procedure (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-procedure)
  • PH Core Patient (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-patient)
  • PH Core Encounter (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-encounter)
  • PH Core RelatedPerson (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-relatedperson)
  • PH Core Practitioner (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-practitioner)
  • PH Core PractitionerRole (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-practitionerrole)
  • PH Core Organization (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-organization)
  • PH Core Location (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-location)
  • PH Core Observation (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-observation)
  • PH Core Medication (https://fhir.doh.gov.ph/phcore/StructureDefinition/ph-core-medication)

 

Other representations of profile: CSV, Excel, Schematron
